synthesis_text: Fever, cough, fatigue, loss of smell (anosmia) and loss of taste (ageusia) are among the most frequently reported symptoms of COVID‑19 [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011].

The most common COVID-19 symptoms are fever or chills, dry cough, shortness of breath, loss of taste or smell, extreme fatigue, headache or muscle aches, digestive symptoms such as upset stomach, vomiting, or diarrhea, and common cold‑like symptoms such as congestion, runny nose, or sore throat [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00002].
The most common symptoms of COVID-19 are fever, cough, and fatigue (tiredness) [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00001].
